system.powerDescription:
Once per scene, you cause simple structures made out of packed ice to erupt from surfaces within range. The total size of these structures may equal CAT. If there is an abundant supply of water, such as a pond, rainfall, etc, they may equal a total size of CAT+1. These structures have a collective durability talisman equal to their CAT size. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
